title: Limit number of concurrent uploads
body:
### Feature request description

As image layers get larger because of more dependencies, there is a need to limit the number of layers being uploaded at the same time.

comments.body:
> there is a need to limit the number 

Or what? Are you seeing failed uploads due to the current number?

A reviewer has determined we need more information to understand the reported issue.  A comment on what is missing should be provided. Be certain you:

* provide an exact reproducer where possible
* verify you have provided all relevant information - minimum is `podman info`
* answer any follow up questions

If no response to the `needs-info` is provided in 30 days, this issue may be closed by our stale bot.

For more information on reporting issues on this repository, consult our [issue guide](ISSUE.md).

If connection interrupts, of course layers that are not uploaded need to restart. Limiting the number of concurrent uploads makes the individual layers uploads faster and therefor lowering the chance of upload restarts for individual layers if that makes sense. Not a priority but an inconvenience for me who has limited upload speed of only 50Mbps.
`image_parallel_copies` exists in `containers.conf`. Is that insufficient, and if so, why?
Does it affect only uploads? Is it permanent? I might only need it for some images I build for AI models.
